overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character with a flashlight and handgun exploring dark underground tunnels and industrial areas. The character moves from narrow passages through railway track areas with crime scene evidence into large industrial caverns and finally a storage room.

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through the narrow tunnel with flashlight and handgun drawn, illuminating the rough stone walls

entered.detail: rough hewn stone walls of the narrow tunnel
dark narrow passage extending into the distance

segments.scene_description: The character navigates a claustrophobic underground tunnel with rough stone walls visible in the flashlight beam. The environment is pitch black except for the flashlight illumination, creating a tense atmosphere as the character moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground railway track area with crime scene evidence

events.description: exits narrow tunnel into wider underground track area with visible railway lines

agents.ego_description: approaching the track area and examining the bloodstains and yellow police tape marking a crime scene

entered.detail: metal railway tracks running through the underground cavern
temporary metal crowd control barriers lining the path
yellow caution tape strung across the area marking a crime scene
red bloodstains on the ground near the tracks
orange traffic cone placed near the barriers

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wider underground area with railway tracks running through the center. Yellow police tape and bloodstains indicate a crime scene. Metal barriers line the path as the character moves forward, with the rough stone walls now visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial warehouse cavern with metal walkways and rubble

events.description: passes through metal gate into large industrial cavern with multiple levels and rubble

agents.ego_description: moving through the industrial area with metal walkways and observing the lower levels through large windows

entered.detail: metal grate flooring of the elevated walkway
large concrete support pillars holding up the cavern ceiling
piles of concrete rubble and debris stacked along the walkway
large metal-framed windows overlooking lower levels of the facility
chain link fencing along the edge of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character enters a vast industrial cavern with metal catwalks and concrete pillars. Large windows reveal lower levels of the facility. The environment shows signs of decay with rubble piles and graffiti on the walls as the character proceeds along the elevated walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: storage room with metal shelving and lockers

events.description: enters enclosed storage room through metal security gate
opens blue locker and retrieves items, ammunition count appears on HUD

agents.ego_description: searching through lockers and storage shelves, opening metal cabinets to find supplies

entered.detail: metal mesh security gate marking the entrance to the storage room
tall metal shelving units filled with boxes and supplies
blue metal storage lockers with doors that can be opened
cardboard boxes stacked on the shelves and floor
wooden workbench table in the center of the room
large industrial pipes and valves along the right wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a confined storage room filled with metal shelving, blue lockers, and industrial equipment. The character interacts with the environment by opening lockers to search for supplies. The room contains workbenches, cardboard boxes, and industrial piping, with a metal security gate visible at the entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous progression from a claustrophobic underground tunnel into a sprawling industrial complex and finally into a confined storage area. It begins in pitch blackness, with a flashlight beam cutting through the dark to reveal rough stone walls in a narrow passage. As the tunnel opens, the camera moves into a wider subterranean space where railway tracks, yellow police tape, and bloodstains mark a crime scene. The scene then expands into a vast industrial cavern, shifting from the tunnel floor to elevated metal catwalks and concrete pillars surrounded by rubble and graffiti. Finally, the movement leads through a metal security gate and into a cramped storage room filled with blue lockers, metal shelving, and industrial equipment.
